Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] referenced in GT key_observations (implied metric for memory stress detection)
Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on memory usage rate anomaly, determined cause is [node_memory_usage_rate] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)
